prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-10SCHHSMFM Product Type: HAMMER_MALLET Brand (from catalog): Universal Hobby Existing Title: Universal 10 inch Stone Carving Hammer Hardened Steel Mallet for Masonry Description: A heavy mallet like this is ideal for breaking up and carving granite, sandstone, tile, and more. You'll also find it useful in small home renovation projects. The wood handle makes for heavier blows in environments where there is limited swing room.

This heavy duty mallet can be used to strike cold chisels, star drills, spikes, hardened nails and punches. It is a very reliable and effective tool that you can count on to get the job done right.

1 1/8 Inch Striking Surface
Forged Steel Head
Solid Wood Handle

Weight: 18.4 ounces or 1.15lbs Search Terms: masonry carving stone hammer steel mallet DIY 20 inch hardened tile crafts hobby gear Features: - Hardened Steel Hammer Head - 10" Wood Handle - Perfect for Stone Masonry - Weight: 1.15lbs or 18.4oz - Dimensions: 10 x 4 x 4 inches (LWH) === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal 10 inch Stone Carving Hammer Mallet

anthropic.title_differentiation: Hardened Steel Head, Solid Wood Handle, 115Lbs, Masonry And Tile Carving

openai.title_differentiation: Hardened Steel Head, Solid Wood Handle, 1-18" Striking Surface, Ideal For Granite, Tile, Masonry
